MaxLineLength:DiagnosticsScreenTest.kt$DiagnosticsScreenTest$"Baseline DNS tampering short-circuited the audit before fallback candidates ran."
MaxLineLength:DiagnosticsScreenTest.kt$DiagnosticsScreenTest$"TCP matrix coverage stayed below 75% of planned candidates."
MaxLineLength:DiagnosticsViewModelTest.kt$DiagnosticsViewModelTest$"TCP matrix coverage stayed below 75% of planned candidates."
MaxLineLength:DiagnosticsViewModelTest.kt$DiagnosticsViewModelTest$"The audit did not execute enough of the planned matrix to fully trust the winner"
